name: Workiva Financial Reporting & Compliance API
what_it_does: Workiva REST API for enterprise financial reporting, compliance, and ESG platform. Enables AI agents to manage document and report creation and collaboration, handle SEC filing and XBRL tagging workflows, access audit management and evidence collection, retrieve ESG data collection and reporting workflows, manage SOX compliance and internal controls, handle financial data integration and transformation, access version control and review workflows, retrieve regulatory reporting analytics, manage entity and document relationships, and integrate financial reporting with ERP and data warehouse systems.
use_cases: Managing SEC filing preparation from financial reporting automation agents
Accessing ESG data collection and reporting from sustainability automation agents
Retrieving audit evidence and SOX compliance from compliance agents
Integrating ERP data into financial reports from financial close agents
not_for: Simple document management without SEC filing and XBRL compliance
Small businesses without public company reporting requirements
Non-financial reporting without compliance and regulatory filing focus
best_when: A public company, financial services firm, or large enterprise using Workiva wants AI agents to automate financial report preparation, SEC filing workflows, XBRL tagging, ESG data collection, SOX compliance, and audit management.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: SEC filing automation must be accurate — filing errors create SEC enforcement risk. XBRL tagging errors affect financial data quality. Automated audit evidence collection must maintain chain of custody. ESG data must be accurate for regulatory reporting. SOX controls automation must maintain segregation of duties.

auth.notes: Workiva uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with document, filing, and compliance scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Python SDK. Webhooks for document and filing events. Wdesk platform for report creation and collaboration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — public company reporting enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user enterprise pricing; solution module pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Ames, Iowa. NYSE: WK. Founded 2008. Major financial reporting and compliance platform. $600M+ annual revenue. Used by 6,000+ organizations including 75% of Fortune 500. Strong SEC filing, SOX, and ESG reporting markets. Acquired OneCloud (ESG). Competes with Certinia and SEC compliance tools for enterprise reporting.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: SEC filing automation — filing errors create SEC enforcement and investor liability risk
XBRL tagging automation must be reviewed by a qualified financial reporting professional
No public MCP server — well-documented OAuth2 REST API with Python SDK
SOX segregation of duties must be maintained — automated workflows must respect control owner assignments
ESG data accuracy — automated collection must validate data sources; greenwashing risk with inaccurate ESG
Audit evidence automation must maintain chain of custody — evidence metadata is critical for auditors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial reporting and compliance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. SEC and SOX compliance sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEC filing and compliance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Public company reporting.
